text.title: shadcn Form Integration
text.summary: shadcn Form component wired with react-hook-form and zod for typed validation.

rule.statement: shadcn `Form` requires both `react-hook-form` and `zod`. Never bypass one — missing either breaks the TypeScript types and runtime validation.
rule.rationale: shadcn's Form wraps react-hook-form's context with Radix accessibility primitives. Zod provides the schema for type inference and validation errors. All three are coupled.

example.note: FormMessage renders zod validation errors automatically. `disabled={form.formState.isSubmitting}` prevents double-submit.

rule.statement: Add `'use client'` only to leaf components that need state or event handlers. Parent pages and layouts must remain Server Components.
rule.rationale: Marking a page `'use client'` prevents any RSC data-fetching benefits for the entire subtree. Most shadcn primitives need `'use client'` only at their own level.
